description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent red hip roof and light-colored exterior walls. The building sits on a rectangular plot, with a paved area surrounding it, and includes multiple windows and doors on all sides. The front facade is distinguished by a covered entryway and a set of steps leading up to the main door. The rear side has large glass doors, likely opening to a patio or backyard area. The windows are arranged in a balanced but not perfectly symmetrical pattern, with some grouped together and others spaced apart. The overall design is compact and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a red hip roof, light walls, and multiple windows and doors, surrounded by a paved area. The design is compact and suburban, with a covered entryway and large rear glass doors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with a covered porch and steps, as well as several windows on the facade.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting large glass doors and additional windows, with a wide paved area behind the bungalow.
description_view_2: Side view displaying a pair of windows and the extension of the hip roof over the side wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with smaller windows and a clear view of the roof's shape and overhang.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows on all sides
